_README: Config for scripts/alert_watch.py (the read-only model-server stall alerter). JSON (not YAML) on purpose: the alerter is stdlib-only so it can never die on a missing dependency. After editing, verify with:  .venv\Scripts\python.exe scripts\alert_watch.py --test

trigger._note: Suspected-server-down only. Fires if EITHER condition holds; one alert per outage. recent_stall_window_sec: a stall counts only if its latest cycle is within this many seconds (ignores hours-old stalls in today's journal at startup).

ntfy._note: Phone push. 1) Install the 'ntfy' app (Android/iOS) or open https://ntfy.sh. 2) Subscribe to the EXACT topic string below. 3) Anyone who knows the topic can read/post, so make it long + unguessable. Then test with --test.

email._note: Email alert. ntfy.sh's FREE tier REJECTS anonymous email (HTTP 400 'anonymous email sending is not allowed'), so via_ntfy is OFF and email uses direct Gmail SMTP (fill in the placeholder addresses below). YOUR ONLY STEP to enable email: (1) enable 2-Step Verification on your own sending Gmail account, (2) create an App Password (Google Account > Security > App passwords), (3) run  setx ATLAS_ALERT_SMTP_PASS "<16-char app password>"  in a new terminal, then relaunch. Until then, ntfy phone push is the active channel (email just skips, gracefully).
